---
pagetitle: "AMX Architecture — Énergie"
lang: fr
---

```{=html}
<header class="hdr">
  <a href="index.html" class="logo">AMx</a>
  <nav class="hdr-nav">
    <a href="conseils.html" class="active">Services</a>
  </nav>
  <a href="contact.html" class="hdr-cta">Contact</a>
</header>

<nav class="nav-bar">
  <a href="conseils.html" class="nav-item"><span class="nav-num">01</span> Conseils</a>
  <a href="urbanisme.html" class="nav-item"><span class="nav-num">02</span> Urbanisme</a>
  <a href="projets.html" class="nav-item"><span class="nav-num">03</span> Projets</a>
  <a href="energie.html" class="nav-item active"><span class="nav-num">04</span> Énergie</a>
</nav>

<div style="flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 4rem 0;">
<section class="cta-band" style="width: 100%;">
  <p class="cta-sub">Certificats PEB & audits énergétiques</p>
  <h2 class="prest-title">- Prochainement -</h2>
</section>
</div>

<footer class="ftr">
  <a href="mailto:contact@amx-architecture.be" style="font-size:11px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#71717a;text-decoration:none;">contact@amx-architecture.be</a>
</footer>
```
